mentions.note: Incredibly well-run company generating gigantic cash flow; downturn will prove to be terrific buying opportunity; not backing away from conviction.
Trading at 23 PE vs O'Reilly's 33 PE despite solid earnings/growth; weak quarter caused sell-off but company is consistent operator that pivots well. Next quarter will be better.

Gary asks about breakdown after years as darling; mystifies me. Best buyback (shrunk float 50% in years); maybe tariff parts concern but little downside here after recent weakness. Can get back in now.
